meta.title: Join us — Ocobo
meta.description: Join Ocobo, France's leading Revenue Operations consultancy. Explore our job openings.

list.empty: No openings available at the moment.

hero.title:
Join the
architects.
hero.intro: Joining Ocobo means joining a team of experts from the best scale-ups (TheFork, PayFit, Qonto).
hero.quote: No "juniors sold as seniors" here. We seek operational excellence and the ability to understand our clients' deep business challenges.
hero.quoteSub: A unique opportunity to learn the best RevOps methodologies and shape the future of the discipline in France.

items.title: Senior Excellence
items.desc: We don't hack things together. We architect robust systems with the highest market standards.

items.title: Radical Transparency
items.desc: No politics, no hidden agendas. We grow through honest feedback and constant self-questioning.

items.title: Measurable Impact
items.desc: Every sprint, every process line, every dashboard must create concrete value for our clients.

items.title: Squad Spirit
items.desc: We never work alone. We share our blockers, victories and learnings in real time.

jobs.sectionSubtitle: We are looking for architects passionate about data and systems.

steps.title: HR, Fit & Motivation
steps.desc: First discussion with HR about the candidate's professional experience, motivations for the role and Ocobo.

steps.title: Hiring Manager Call
steps.desc: First discussion with the RevOps manager for a more detailed exchange on professional experience and role challenges.

steps.title: Technical Interview
steps.desc: Discussion on the technical and methodological skills essential for Ocobo.

steps.title: Case Study
steps.desc: Presentation of the case study prepared in advance to all founders to validate technical skills.

steps.title: Cultural Fit
steps.desc: Exchange with a team member to validate alignment with Ocobo's values and ambition, allowing the candidate to ask questions to an Ocobo RevOps consultant.

steps.title: Reference Check
steps.desc: Reference check with a former employer.

apply.title: Ready for impact?
apply.desc: Send us your profile. We're not looking for executors, but architects of revenue.

coffee.title:
Come grab
a coffee.
coffee.desc: We love talking RevOps, even if you're not looking for a job right now.
